gddegp_utils

Functions

compute_dimension_differences(k, X1, X2, n1, n2, ...)

Compute differences for a single dimension k.

differences_by_dim_func(X1, X2, rays_X1, rays_X2, n_order)

Compute dimension-wise differences with OTI tagging on both X1 and X2.

make_der_indices(num_directions, max_order)

Build the list of derivative-index specs:

deriv_map(nbases, order)

transform_der_indices(der_indices, der_map)

rbf_kernel(differences, length_scales, max_order, ...)

Assembles the full DD-GP covariance matrix using an efficient, pre-computed

Module Contents

gddegp_utils.compute_dimension_differences(k, X1, X2, n1, n2, rays_X1, rays_X2, e_tags_1, e_tags_2)[source]

Compute differences for a single dimension k.

gddegp_utils.differences_by_dim_func(X1, X2, rays_X1, rays_X2, n_order, return_deriv=True)[source]

Compute dimension-wise differences with OTI tagging on both X1 and X2. Optimized version that pre-computes tags to avoid redundant calculations.

gddegp_utils.make_der_indices(num_directions: int, max_order: int)[source]
Build the list of derivative-index specs:
[[tag, order], â€¦] for every order = 1..max_order

and every tag = 1..num_directions

gddegp_utils.deriv_map(nbases, order)[source]
gddegp_utils.transform_der_indices(der_indices, der_map)[source]
gddegp_utils.rbf_kernel(differences, length_scales, max_order, kernel_func, index=-1, return_deriv=True)[source]

Assembles the full DD-GP covariance matrix using an efficient, pre-computed derivative array and block-wise matrix filling.

Parameters:

  • function ((Parameters are the same as the original)

  • added) (with n_bases)

Returns:

K – Full kernel matrix with function values and derivative blocks.

Return type:

ndarray
